conceptClusters.title: Inherited values, intrinsic geometry, matching, and glyph fallback
exitEvidence: Learner traces inherited values and intrinsic geometry before claiming that a family or fallback rendered.
Learner distinguishes family matching from per-character fallback under unavailable faces and changed content.

conceptClusters.title: Face selection ranges and controlled synthesis
exitEvidence: Learner predicts style, weight, width, coverage, and synthesis before inspecting the rendered face.
Learner preserves semantic emphasis and readability when a requested real face is unavailable.

conceptClusters.title: Licensed sources, activation, display lifecycle, and failure
exitEvidence: Learner separates parsing, request, response, activation, matching, paint, readiness, and failure evidence.
Learner proves permission, notices, privacy, payload, subset coverage, and fallback before accepting a resource.

conceptClusters.title: Fallback metrics, variable ranges, and optical sizing
exitEvidence: Learner measures line geometry before adjusting fallback metrics or accepting layout stability.
Learner verifies variable ranges and properties while proving clamp, fallback, coverage, and payload behavior.

conceptClusters.title: Language feature resolution, palettes, and presentation fallback
exitEvidence: Learner connects language, face support, precedence, and shaping without unsafe global overrides.
Learner preserves semantic text, contrast, non-color meaning, forced colors, print, and monochrome fallback.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: annotated causal font selection and delivery evidence model
activityDesigns.startingState: The font-delivery-evidence fixture supplies bounded facts but no accepted solution or complete causal font evidence.
activityDesigns.completionState: The annotated causal font model records correct behavior, a changed case, correction path, and defensible evidence for every competency.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names the observed font evidence, unmet competency, reader or delivery consequence, and smallest useful next action.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints reveal one evidence boundary at a time and never disclose the complete source, value, diagnosis, or defense.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to a smaller mechanism trace and a different changed case before retrying the original competency.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes research-backed interaction purposes, evidence, order, correction, and changed cases; it is not learner-facing prose, executable starter code, grading implementation, or publication evidence.

gaps: Original explanations, examples, starters, assets, executable checks, server-side answers, feedback branches, and persisted attempts remain unauthored.
A font specialist must independently review selection, shaping, licensing, subset, metric, variable-axis, color-font, and privacy claims against exact assets.
The editor and preview need keyboard, screen-reader, zoom, forced-colors, print, tablet, desktop, offline, slow-network, and failed-resource verification.
Representative beginners must complete delayed parallel forms before timing, fading, correction, retention, transfer, accessibility, or validity can be approved.
